textByHash.01a2dbc4408e859f60e6d1dc5c6e7f577771b33d: Tank's very much for da chompy... Fycie an Bugs like very much da chompy yumms! ~ The family of ogres sit down together and enjoy your well cooked chompy bird. ~
textByHash.031a1f6af31a4761616ecf00cb82b28828072140: Me finks me has found one...
textByHash.03ec165c9a8d232b5498dbe124486c5fde5be3f6: Rantz done used da stabbie chucker and stock da dirt for da over der' place. You's creature make da chompy by da stabber so Fycie and Bugs sniffs da bestest yumms and splosh over wiv da boatsie!
textByHash.04b1c1adde5388b2f7ad9f0b29c444cfaa8607a6: You's creatures not done for Rantz fingies yet! Da boatsie is da guddun...will carry rantz to da over place?
textByHash.077539f29e821a982eff1f4b2d592a9dfb4549ae: You's creatures says what Rantz need for da going over da big water to da over'der place.
textByHash.090b131e55fdb990e7a73f438286ca9e669d3306: No space 'uman. Make some for da stabbies.
textByHash.0c4e8c05dfa5ffb230a77d4328834cbee2d42a1e: You do stabbers quick quick! Or Rantz make stabbers for Rantz and then practice for chompy sticking on creature!
textByHash.0cebb77e83c379b7f02a2ac78cfaf8a56d7c4b9d: Hey, deese stabbers no good... did you make dem you's self? You go make dem stabbers for me creature! Don't get old ones or from other creatures.
textByHash.0e244da4c3ad3bd41e665cf87539b833faaa8213: Yeah, is what Rantz sayed, make da stabbers for da stabby chucker!
textByHash.123e4bf2f012e03528ee14562307a9a946ada3a7: Yous creature, go see little guy and help wiv da man flapper 'come-down-place'...den Rantz helps yous creature wiv da fluffsies sack.
textByHash.13676c85b210fd65c1f24b7644cb2c3f5fa65764: Hey creature got da fatsy toady Is you's gonna stick da chompy?
textByHash.16ad582803b919587b61c0d55c4f510b1fda3b53: Is what me's says...you's creature no helpsies...just says Rantz saysies back!
textByHash.171d06c1ea41292d5f1b6ff63153d2e1afd1b736: Yous creature needs to bring me da saggy fluffsies sack to full wiv da chompy flufsies!
textByHash.17bb50f8fcc51e5658420c5dfe2b5c41e0657886: I knows, I keeps missing... because your stabbers are worserer at flying than a dead dog.
textByHash.1afca81980261f3ccc7fafe2d9bfa2cc4a879d1b: Da chompies don't come no more since he's banging all da time.
textByHash.1c7c5034521925e5607723c60278714001b9dc52: Huh der is this many colours: ~ Rantz holds up six fingers. ~ And der is dis many different hatsies: ~ Rantz holds up three fingers. ~
textByHash.1e1cce03566f0fa56aed4fe74e4b9910a6df0804: You's already claimed da stabbies today 'uman. Come toe'morrow for mor'
textByHash.1f81eaee9fe6109539bb72234b8f1433240224d0: Grrr creature... you's no good stabber maker! You's make da stabbie bit from da dog bones, and get da sticksies from da Achey tree... simple see? Oh and da flufsies from da flappers as well!
textByHash.2006cdd6365116ca7e75e10a517a3ac9e3fef04b: If you creature shows me da bow wiv da notches on it, I'll give ya a flapper hat... is dat simple enough for you's creature?
textByHash.201940882a465fe020ea2953a17f78a3e3fdb5eb: Yous creature dun a gud fing...Rantz give yous creature da fluffsies sack now...
textByHash.20eaaab2492126ca40fa3f5d0fe9e8779371f1b4: Hav' da stabbies. More toe'morrow if you come see Rantz.
textByHash.21f7441ec20cb16d67713196ee2e8e4acb24b773: Ok you's person...goes find da stabber!
textByHash.21fed9bb0ff18f565576eecfa263e5a7b4004bb1: Hey, yous creature needs to hunt more chompies if you's wants der's flappy hat!
textByHash.26640374d6475864ce3dec93715a374450646c90: Huh, dat's a true thing but you's godda be da good shooter wiv da stabbie chucker and stick lotsa chompies for da hatsie.
textByHash.282ef980e13822ad5547059bfc3f021a45a33614: Creatures not done Rantz stuffsies yet!
textByHash.2c9e221df405d571c6dd00d11bf890d03425c7dd: Hey, you's creature, is da fatsy toady still dere? Go get more fatsy toadies if dey all gone!
textByHash.35cb52047e058d8823e4114c9f987041e3a62901: Fatsy toadies are da chompy burds bestest yumms. But da toadies here are too small for da chompy. You've godda make da toadies big and round!
textByHash.35d372cbe49472c255d9ff83541f7c55b7d91ff3: Hey you creature..you made da stabbers Dat's good creature!
textByHash.3a30c70e8573d56a990020bda488ba74a76500f7: Den yous no get da fluffsies sack...
textByHash.3e347fac543b6a3e82d38252fdafd9afcd4ce9e3: Hey You! Got da chompy yet?
textByHash.41d69d9eb26e1ac7aff70bfe0210aaea62673079: Erm.. Da's very kindly of you creature!
textByHash.420229511a029b5fbec9c7ecdfd6d017d74771c7: Yep, da spit's over der! Last time Rantz did yummies, got very bad, did bad things to food...and belly.
textByHash.42c1882789ca6cadb21118cc35c24ffe62bd2835: Erk! Da's a yukky chompy, I's wants a yummie chompy!
textByHash.465bcb22b3f98e3735d0d6b0a7d1e06df8248b0b: Hey hey! We got da delicious chompy bird - yay! This looks really tasty as well!
textByHash.46f35e6af4d476ce8b541bee2d0a279747442cb6: Skrach...he big boss? Skrach like da Jubbly chompy...is bestest yums like chompy.
textByHash.475173964915c57ee070d0632269073f7d35d565: Okay's now you's needs to cook da chompy! Slurp! You's can cook it's over der! <col=0000ff>~ Rantz points to a nearby spit roast. ~
textByHash.477b0fde1a9451988f4a59483a557fbc77a167df: We'll dat's da fing wiv da hatsies, dey's many hatsies for da many chompies dat you stick. But you's godda get at least this many for a hat. ~ Rantz flashes fingers at you, you think he means 30. ~
textByHash.4d10e8e6e5ec908dc94dff981bdeef3d4afa3eb8: Is just what Rantz sayed! ~ The hulking ogre nods excitedly. ~
textByHash.4e247221fbec09d35d95b086ec3ee3f380141f0d: Over 'dere creature, put da toadies over der! ~ The ogre points to a clearing to the south. ~
textByHash.4e89edc84ec3194d86bc9024bfa47e1a7075aac9: Dat's da good fing, you's creature goes down by da watery place, over near da cabbage! Me's says more der'.
textByHash.4ed7225941871dc7f02be6fb96132fc1eca1156f: Hey you creature... Have you made me da stabbers? I wanna stick da chompy?
textByHash.5139d54716b245f94a23fdb31348d6eb9ea0d979: De're yous goes creatures...dere's yous comfy fluffsies sack.
textByHash.544da05bb15e61964d9dcfcf5916738dc49ef132: Creatures not done yet! Da boatsie not good for da stuffsies! Da stuffsies for da glug-glugs goes in da watery stuffs.
textByHash.550baccffcc1fc563ea95398aab9986ffba51ea0: But's we's particular about our chompy yumms. Me's wants Potato wiv mine! Fycie and Bugs want something wiv der's as well, go and ask 'em wat dey want.
textByHash.5ad9ef3336560f4c1310b3edb7a9e561e47b8674: Chompys love da fatsy toadies. Toadies get big on der swamp gas and der chompys are licking der lips for em as me is licking lips for da chompy. Da chompys don't like da smaller toadies from nearby swampy.
textByHash.5c03cb74dc75deef79e38cd25994e858c98aa3a9: For da stabbie chucker, I's wanna hunt da chompy! Da chompy is der bestest yummies for Rantz, Fycie and Bugs! Creature knows what Rantz wants... flyin' to stabbie da chompy!
textByHash.5e2978c93b102a8b599b5ed1c5ee77c649a58b0c: Ok creature? You got dat? Over dere by der no tree's place.
textByHash.61a4c00961c167096dbc4c3b167425b2a2073363: Hey you creature, you still here?
textByHash.63fe82a726ac88c19a7abb5761f8623416419fab: Oh, ok...I lend you other stabby thrower... but creature don't better cry when it hurts itself.
textByHash.67fa163d2de674a6ba35b3e389466bb04aaa0d9e: Ok you's creature, here's da hatsies! ~ Rantz shows you the hats. ~
textByHash.699b1fbc8cec36117ab2dbcce0c46ce846377ed7: It cost you dis many bright pretties to do dis again, yous den be more careful wiv my work next time round.
textByHash.69f2d5385226a78e30a2a63e7c0a864348af6dd6: You's creature...goes to da over der' place and cook da chompy by da stabber!
textByHash.69f5f7a5a896b755895139c8ae45885f3a18910b: Soon, creature be da ogre too like Rantz! Harr, har, har!
textByHash.6a785186d1605de0cc7c4889f6736fefcbbe43ae: Yous do other stuffsies for Rantz first. We's needs da bestest groundy for da walking on new land.
textByHash.6b28ec253728c430e9130537d3f5651cba2ef681: Hey, 'dee'se stabbers no good! Did you make dem you's self? YOU go make dem arrows for ME creature!
textByHash.6eae02fce342a5a9b4a4e9717fc82d741f19141c: You's person has too much junk for da flappy hat... Rantz keeps it insteads! ~ Rantz chuckles to himself. ~
textByHash.72f2bd23e557cbfc2c8653a8acf7e5402553fe43: Ohhh, get's Jubbly...dat's da easy fing...you's creature is a bit stoopid for not know dat!
textByHash.76244de958f14f8edf67b2a9ca0cc2440d5b7b5a: When I make 'stabbers', I pretend you chompy and practice on you!
textByHash.77ae0fd4263c432bbb6cbfa766a25dc89652e646: Hey you don't got da coins...come back when you have.
textByHash.7950525d02a0392faa66f2c54bdcbaa0727974bd: Creature already given Rantz stabbers, Dey's worser at flying dan a dead dog.
textByHash.7c451899c82cc77d3e20330513c1a0d41b431ac5: Yep, da spit's over der! Last time Rantz did yummies, got very bad, did bad things to food... and belly.
textByHash.7f4d8e8ac8ec4ee55678a6981420403ccdb78f7c: Yous do dis creature for da Jubbly?
textByHash.8257a3c918196c20b00242b0c5a560001d82ceae: Dat's a good fatsy toady, now we's need to put it for da chompy to come.
textByHash.856ef1f820b1954ee881a556b80159fdd280157a: Dat would be da good find...den me's help wiv da flufsies sack.
textByHash.857f5695cf8f86ceeaeaf9171a0a12006264a319: You's can help da little guy, he's over der near da ogre city...he's stuck wiv sumfing, making da man flapper 'come-down-place'. Me's not doin' no chompy hunting wiv dat noise going on.
textByHash.87bd382f3c42f5945970a654b78302ea85c18ef8: Sorry, but der's no new hats for you this time! Go shoot some more chompies.
textByHash.8d69c4ecd02c86fe1d0097bb8727dbd4b4cc4f70: Rantz use stabbie chucker and stick da dirt for da over der' place. You's creature make da chompy by da stabber so Fycie and Bugs sniffs da bestest yumms and splosh over wiv da boatsie!
textByHash.945d4753f36215bdf84ca29ef32886b2806521f7: Ok then you's creature...you's use da big blowers on da fatsie toady. Creature makes da fatsie toady and den needs da rocksie an da wooly fing to stick it down da ground.
textByHash.95870240dc6ad1e3b4536b5c8cd0050cc638b98b: Me's shows da creatures how to sneaky, sneaky stick da Jubbly!
textByHash.96e3614b8232e991920c6eba8c8e97d9f0385409: Goodz, me now waits for da chompy! It shouldn't be long now. Sneaky... sneaky...
textByHash.97271b40a4d199bac24c72fb705607763bf82815: Hey, dere's da chompy, I's gonna shoot it.
textByHash.9744cb50f16037636f83969c20e3537d3b758b91: Dat's a pidy... but maybe Rantz can help da creature?
textByHash.a0962c276464c43b10e5e6be2b71bb524da4ba1d: But creature do Rantz stuffsies first...yous creature gets Rantz to other lands over 'der so Rantz gets da stuffsies for da glugs-glugs.
textByHash.a6e8d45a2142b235547549c68e16a844d548b96a: Rantz tell creature hows to stick da Jubbly...just like da Chompy...
textByHash.a888d5315698ba9232a8b43c01853729b42eebeb: You's creature shuvs flapper sack in rantz face, making rantz very upset
textByHash.a954b4d27ee1a1d9ca216c10271ba7eacab01c79: Dat's a great chompy, you musta got a lucky shot wiv da stabbie chucker.
textByHash.aa315418f99085fc7e753e364bb7372a61ff3b87: Well hurry up and get some, we is hungry!
textByHash.ab6d16804ba6139e453dc30346f53d742c8a8204: Okay's now you's needs to cook da chompy! Slurp! You's can cook it's over der! ~ Rantz points to a nearby spit roast. ~
textByHash.b0c1e7763b7a40da5a8faa2dae00dd582880fe25: Huh der is this many colours... ~ Rantz holds up six fingers.~ And der is dis many different hatsies... ~ Rantz holds up three fingers.~
textByHash.b1562f52ab7401cd84fff8b1816c9eadf93fd032: But's we's particular about our chompy yumms. Me's wants Onion. wiv mine! Fycie and Bugs want something wiv der's as well, go and ask 'em wat dey want.
textByHash.bbba326d93471efd8ff9a60fe19b728743093d4e: You's creatures says dis before! Skrach big boss? Skrach like da Jubbly chompy...is bestest yums like chompy.
textByHash.bdd985452156f8e556e8fda1bac5c5c26e3baf86: Ahh, der creature has dem... goodly, goodly. Now us can stick der chompy bird...
textByHash.be1a9de5219e153f562f0092810d8540bab1ac5e: Ok, you's creature makes it better!
textByHash.c47c8c979ff904881bcdc1c5e102278be3fe04bc: Da little guy, he's making da man flapper 'come-down-place'...so deyz more of yous creatures coming to see Rantz...but he's takin ages to do it.
textByHash.ca37ccaaee950defea6792d82a16022cbf31c400: Da chompy still not coming! We need da fatsy toady to get da chompy, do you got it? Do you got da fatsy toady? Then we can sneaky, sneaky stick da chompy.
textByHash.cd27c609c95113433fb870cf152785b5a039e659: Dat's not enough, me's an good shot, but need some for practice. Bring more than fingers on hand...
textByHash.cda70af42e020b5ccf98defe7544ed227883c1dc: No, is Rantz stabby thrower... you too weedy...
textByHash.cf57b2fb0931014479553226f3fab900a309e67d: Hey, you did good wiv da stabbie chucker, der's a flappy hat for ya.
textByHash.d1949b3b0da1ba33743eadf3ae87479f2891ec2c: Hey deyr, t'anks for da chompy, it was scrumbly!
textByHash.d4677fb3608b4a315c54643bd29afd11c36316af: Good creature, quickly, hurry bring da stabbers!
textByHash.d67028184ca6045aab4b3eecdf0c0c479579ccbd: Hey, yous creature needs to hunt da chompie if you's wants der's flappy hat!
textByHash.d687e9ccbb4ab5d213596d13e90a974e741bb748: You's creature show me da bow den!
textByHash.d700bd4197844b22ff4672dca3d8fe9856dad429: Dat's da shame thing dat is! No flapper hat for you den!
textByHash.d9ff297ff90313c083a17838f05f12c7752f9cad: But da chompy not coming without da fatsy toadies... Godda get der fatsy toadies to get da chompys. Den we put it over de're and sneaky, sneaky stick da chompy.
textByHash.e1ad270724eb4bd7074b03bb037bcc2cf48e28c6: Dey's fussie eaters just like Rantz. Fycie an' Bugs play with toadies and blower dey's all times making fatsy toadies.
textByHash.e58d604211dee17a50458769d0d5ab54b285c0a1: Der's no flappers to get cos da little guy scares dem away wiv his banging. He's making da man flapper 'come-down-place' and it's takin' ages and ages.
textByHash.e7fba8eb738b340f47861841606f0c11975cb6b5: Duh! You creature is a bit stoopid yes? Us needs to sneaky, sneaky and stick da chompy! Den we can eat da chompy!
textByHash.ecde1c45961014c474bd925b50e4389bd5e3ba48: You's creature gets Rantz to other lands over 'der so Rantz gets da stuffsies for da glug-glugs.
textByHash.eec7eb658a0ffdd2c1f05de59e861957140a211a: Good you creature, you need sticksies from achey tree and stabbies from dog bones.
textByHash.f19aecef0e53598619233e2f30c5f0f5aec71654: De're yous goes creature...da fluffsies sack is full now.
textByHash.f4bfed10b79ae152287cdc4471376acef4241c44: Yeah, it's a goodly stabbie chucker, but you's is too weedy to use it like Rantz.
textByHash.f771689dee923f1b5976af821133da0d8f13ffed: Hey creature, did you's get da cooked chompy yet? I smelled something cooking and it mades me 'ungry. Hand over da chompy if ya know what's good for ya.
textByHash.fb629a6270289746676f379239bfde824382e6c2: Mee's has, but is not for freeness, dis one cost of da gold coinses. Does you wants it?
textByHash.fc2c1edf5666413b7b2edf32179066eac6c59d96: Grrrr... You lookin' like a chompy!
textByHash.fe7503d4f070bc78eb6661066bcfc9925f221e54: Hey you creature! Make me some stabbers! I wanna hunt da chompy?
